message:
fix(console): correct cursor positioning to match Python Rich's 0-based API

Python Rich's Control constructors use 0-based coordinates internally
and add +1 when formatting ANSI escape sequences (terminals are 1-based).

- CursorMoveToColumn: default param changed from 1 to 0, output
  now formats as column0+1 to produce correct 1-based escape
- CursorMoveTo: parameters are now treated as (x0, y0) 0-based
  and formatted as (y0+1, x0+1) matching Rich's (x, y) convention

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
